archetype.name: Red Mantis Assassin
archetype.note: This archetype offers Twin Feint at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Twin Feint
feat.requirement: You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand
feat.text: You use an attack with one weapon to distract your foe from a second attack coming at a different angle. Make one Strike with each of your two melee weapons, both against the same target. The target is automatically off-guard against the second attack. Apply your multiple attack penalty to the Strikes normally.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
